title: Generative AI in the legal sector: David Cohen speaks to Lexpert TV
content:
## Generative AI in the legal sector: David Cohen speaks to Lexpert TV
McCarthy Tétrault’s ongoing efforts to incorporate generative AI into its legal practice, aiming to optimize workflows and enhance client service delivery, were part of a roundtable discussion with Lexpert TV in partnership with Thomson Reuters .
David Cohen , Senior Director, Client Service Delivery at McCarthy Tétrault, participates in the roundtable, exploring the transformative impact of generative AI on the legal sector. During the session, David highlighted the firm's enthusiastic adoption of AI technologies and the training that is being conducted for lawyers at the firm on how to use generative AI tools responsibly and effectively.
“Having best-in-class prompts that are shared and available to our lawyers is something we certainly weren’t discussing a couple of years ago,” David noted during the discussion.
The use of generative AI tools is part of McCarthy Tétrault’s broader strategy to leverage technology to generate efficiencies, improve legal work product and surface new insights for clients.
Read David’s comments and watch the full roundtable interview .
